title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 254.140 - Firewood and domestic use timber cutting permitted
text:
254.140.  Firewood and domestic use timber cutting permitted. — Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as limiting the right of any such person to cut from said forest croplands owned or controlled by him, firewood and timber for his own domestic use.
(L. 1945 p. 672 § 27, A.L. 1974 H.B. 1210)
